mnemonics: CPU ABC: Arithmetic, Branching, Control - the three primary functions of the Basic Processing Unit
keyPoints: The ALU performs arithmetic and logic operations
The control unit manages instruction execution flow
Registers provide fast storage for operands and addresses
commonMistakes: Confusing data path with control signals
Forgetting that the PC holds the address of the next instruction
Mixing up the roles of MAR (Memory Address Register) and MDR (Memory Data Register)
